title: Invalid key error during file upload to Supabase
symptom: When attempting to upload a file to Supabase, the user encounters an 'invalid key' error message. This prevents the file from being successfully uploaded.
not_this_if: File names do not contain special characters
Error occurs in a different context
root_cause: Supabase has restrictions on file names, specifically that they cannot contain accented characters. When a file name includes such characters, it results in an 'invalid key' error during the upload process.
fix_steps: Rename the file to remove any accented characters
agent_instruction: Ensure the file name does not contain any accented characters before uploading to Supabase.
